description: Gnosia is a SinglePlayer social deduction game

v0.1.0.description:
First version of the AP World

Check the [Client Page](https://github.com/Mat8071/Gnosia-AP-Client/tree/v0.1.0#gnosia-archipelago-randomizer) for more info
v0.1.0.title: v0.1.0

v0.1.1.description:
This is what changed from version 0.1.0:
- Fixed logic: Otome's Resolution now correctly requires Shigemichi

You can check the Client changes [here](https://github.com/Mat8071/Gnosia-AP-Client/releases/tag/v0.1.1).
v0.1.1.title: v0.1.1

v0.1.2.description:
Changes from 0.1.1:
- Logic Change: The rule that determines whether the player has event search is now more accurate (some event access logic makes use of it in certain cases)
- Fixed Logic: All events that require the player to be Gnosia with someone else now require the correct amount of crew members for the number of Gnosia to be settable to the correct amount (Previously, this was true only for some of them)
- Fixed Logic: the location "Learn About Let's Collaborate" now specifically requires at least 8 crew members since it's only obtainable on the night of day 2 at the earliest
- Some general code cleanup and improvements

You can check the Client changes [here](https://github.com/Mat8071/Gnosia-AP-Client/releases/tag/v0.1.2)
v0.1.2.title: v0.1.2
